title: dracaena angustifolia var. angustior
intro: Dracaena angustifolia var. angustior, also known as the narrow-leaved dragon tree, is a plant species belonging to the Asparagaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing stress, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, preparations of Dracaena angustifolia var. angustior are made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is often used to treat various ailments.
